prompt.content: Create a Unit 2 Overview document for the 'To Kill a Mockingbird' course. The unit begins the day after the 'Unit 1, Chapter 1-14 Assessment' and ends on the last day of the 1st Trimester, as listed in the 2025-26 Calendar_Dallastown.pdf. Half days still count as full instructional days. The second-to-last day of the unit is reserved for the 'Unit 2 Review Chapters 15-31', and the final day is for the 'Final Unit 2 TKAM Assessment'. The overview should include the unit title, course name, start date, end date, total instructional days, total number of lessons, a unit summary, and the unit's essential questions. Compose the unit summary based on the themes, standards, and essential questions in the curriculum guide and the writing style used in the Unit 1 summary the curriculum guide does not contain a pre-written summary. Pull the essential questions from the curriculum guide.
